se2DataStudioConventions.displayNames: Display names match in-game terminology whenever practical.
se2DataStudioConventions.internalKeys: Internal JSON property names use camelCase.
se2DataStudioConventions.volume: Storage capacity is stored in liters.
se2DataStudioConventions.ordering: Arrays preserve intentional display order unless otherwise documented.
se2DataStudioConventions.null: A null value represents an unknown or currently undocumented value rather than zero.
se2DataStudioConventions.emptyCollections: Empty arrays or objects represent known placeholders for future data rather than omitted information.

metadata.title: Space Engineers 2 Manufacturing & Blocks Dataset
notes: Single grid system only; no small vs. large grids.
Block names include their largest dimension where applicable.
This dataset currently captures only information explicitly provided by the user.

glossary.referenceData: Contains the canonical lookup definitions used throughout the remainder of the dataset.
glossary.presentationData: Information intentionally duplicated to support editors, visualizations, grouping, or workflow organization. Presentation data is not considered authoritative lookup data.
glossary.production: A manufacturing transformation that converts one or more resources (e.g., production groups, recipes, and manufacturing organization) into one or more outputs.
glossary.recipe: The minimum information required to describe a single production transformation (e.g., production groups, recipes, and manufacturing organization).
glossary.rawMaterial: A naturally occurring material obtained directly from the game world. Also commonly referred to as a Natural Resource or Ore. 'Raw Material' is the canonical term used throughout this dataset.
glossary.refineryProduct: A material produced directly from refining raw materials.
glossary.component: A manufactured intermediate item used to construct higher-level game objects.
glossary.block: A placeable entity and associated properties that exists within the game world.

notes: SE2's Wiki.gg current category contains 317 total pages (it CLAIMS 329!).
